541-857-7777

Careers

Whether you’re looking for a place to start a career or just want to find that next job, you deserve a workplace that encourages you to learn and grow—and has lots of great perks, of course! Not only will you be surrounded by the best residents, talented coworkers, and a dedicated leadership team, we offer the security of an incredible benefits package.

Rogue Valley Manor is looking for lively team members to provide exceptional service to our residents. As a proud member of the Pacific Retirement Services family of communities, we also offer a variety of career opportunities in the growing field of aging services. Apply today—we can’t wait to get to know you!

Perks of working at Rogue Valley Manor:

  • Subsidized medical, dental, and vision insurance
  • 401(k) with employer matching
  • Employer-contributed retirement plan
  • Generous PTO (paid time off) program
    • *Time is earned upon start date; accrual based on hours worked
  • Access to on-site pool and fitness center
  • Career-centered opportunities for advancement
  • Early wage access through PayActiv
  • Education Tuition Assistance Program and Employee Development
  • Employee Referral Bonus Program
  • Employee recognition programs
  • Free employee parking
Search Job Openings

  • General Assistance: 541-857-7777
  • Residency Inquiries: 541-857-7214
  • Skilled Nursing & Rehab: 541-857-7131
  • Memory Support: 541-857-7725
